cards.title: RepEventRecord SwiftData migration guard (data-safety)
cards.phase: backlog · scoped (found during S7 live check)
cards.nextAction: Add an explicit lightweight migration / itemId default so a device on a pre-itemId RepEventRecord schema can't hard-crash on update (CoreData recovery wipes the store = lost rep history). Confirm real-device schema is not at risk.
